name: FormBuilder.Photo
comment:
Create a photo selector field in FormBuilder.

@docs default

values.name: default
values.comment: Generates a default photo selector field.

name: FormBuilder.Photo.Attributes

aliases.name: PhotoAttributes
aliases.comment: Attributes of the photo field. Expand FormBuilder.
aliases.type: { photosAlbums : Maybe PhotosAlbums, selectedPhotoId : Maybe String, onPhotoClick : Maybe (Event msg) }

values.name: defaultAttributes
values.comment: Default Attributes of the photo field.

values.name: selection
values.comment:
Set the different parameters for the photos selection.
- photos is list of labelled lists (List (String, List String)) of URLs.
- selectedPhotoId is a Maybe String, containing the selected photo if any.
- onPhotoClick represent the message to send when a photo is clicked.
- fieldAttributes are the attributes of the field.
values.type: Maybe PhotosAlbums -> Maybe String -> (String -> msg) -> FieldAttributes (PhotoAttributes msg) msg -> FieldAttributes (PhotoAttributes msg) msg
